## ✅ 自检清单 | Self-check Checklist

<!-- 请在提交 PR 前逐项检查。| Please check each item before submitting the PR. -->

### 结构与命名 | Structure & Naming

- [ ] 课程主文件使用与目录同名的 `.md` 文件（非 `README.md`）| Main course file uses directory-name `.md` (not `README.md`)
- [ ] 目录和文件命名符合规范（中文名 + 数字前缀）| Directory and file naming follows conventions
- [ ] 已删除对应的 `.gitkeep` 占位文件 | Corresponding `.gitkeep` files removed

### 内容质量 | Content Quality

- [ ] 包含所有必需章节（前置知识、学习目标、正文、实践、练习、参考资料）| Contains all required sections
- [ ] 采用叙事引导式行文 | Uses narrative-driven writing style
- [ ] 术语首次出现标注中英文 | Terms include Chinese-English annotations on first occurrence

### 技术准确性 | Technical Accuracy

- [ ] 数学公式正确且格式规范（行内公式前后有空格）| Math formulas are correct and properly formatted
- [ ] 代码可直接运行 | Code is directly runnable
- [ ] 链接使用相对路径且可正常访问 | Links use relative paths and are accessible

### 提交规范 | Commit Conventions

- [ ] 提交信息格式：`[阶段编号/主题模块] 动作：知识点名称` | Commit message format followed
- [ ] 未修改 `知识图谱可视化/` 目录 | No changes to `知识图谱可视化/` directory
